questionHtml:
What molecule functions as the final electron acceptor in the mitochondrial electron transport chain?

A. Oxygen

B. ATP

C. Reduced NAD

D. Reduced FAD

meta.title: What molecule functions as the final electron acceptor in the mitochondrial electron transport chain? A. Oxygen B. ATP C. Reduced NAD D. Reduced FAD
breadcrumbLabels: C1.2.13. Transfer of energy by reduced NAD to the electron transport chain in the mitochondrion
